# Crew Compass

> Workforce management for janitorial and facilities teams — scheduling, time clock with geofencing, quality control inspections, supply management, and CRM. Built by Summit Facilities Group.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Crew Compass and access to the app.
- [Request a Quote](/get-a-quote): Contact form for facility services quotes from Summit Facilities Group.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How Crew Compass collects, uses, and protects user data.
